name: The Wind Waker
description: Legend has it that whenever evil has appeared, a hero named Link has arisen to defeat it.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Progression Dungeons
options.description: This controls whether dungeon locations are randomized.

options.label: Progression Tingle Chests
options.description: Tingle Chests are hidden in dungeons and must be bombed to make them appear.

options.label: Progression Dungeon Secrets
options.description: DRC, FW, TotG, ET, and WT each contain 2-3 secret items (11 in total).

options.label: Progression Puzzle Secret Caves
options.description: This controls whether the rewards from puzzle-focused secret caves are randomized locations.

options.label: Progression Combat Secret Caves
options.description: This controls whether the rewards from combat-focused secret caves (besides Savage Labyrinth) are randomized locations.

options.label: Progression Savage Labyrinth
options.description: This controls whether the two locations in Savage Labyrinth are randomized.

options.label: Progression Great Fairies
options.description: This controls whether the items given by Great Fairies are randomized.

options.label: Progression Short Sidequests
options.description: This controls whether sidequests that can be completed quickly are randomized.

options.label: Progression Long Sidequests
options.description: This controls whether long sidequests (e.g., Lenzo's assistant, withered trees, goron trading) are randomized.

options.label: Progression Spoils Trading
options.description: This controls whether the items you get by trading in spoils to NPCs are randomized.

options.label: Progression Minigames
options.description: This controls whether most minigames are randomized (auctions, mail sorting, barrel shooting, bird-man contest).

options.label: Progression Battlesquid
options.description: This controls whether the Windfall battleship minigame is randomized.

options.label: Progression Free Gifts
options.description: This controls whether gifts freely given by NPCs are randomized (Tott, Salvage Corp, imprisoned Tingle).

options.label: Progression Mail
options.description: This controls whether items received from the mail are randomized.

options.label: Progression Platforms Rafts
options.description: This controls whether lookout platforms and rafts are randomized.

options.label: Progression Submarines
options.description: This controls whether submarines are randomized.

options.label: Progression Eye Reef Chests
options.description: This controls whether the chests that appear after clearing out the eye reefs are randomized.

options.label: Progression Big Octos Gunboats
options.description: This controls whether the items dropped by Big Octos and Gunboats are randomized.

options.label: Progression Triforce Charts
options.description: This controls whether the sunken treasure chests marked on Triforce Charts are randomized.

options.label: Progression Treasure Charts
options.description: This controls whether the sunken treasure chests marked on Treasure Charts are randomized.

options.label: Progression Expensive Purchases
options.description: This controls whether items that cost many Rupees are randomized (Rock Spire shop, auctions, Tingle's letter, trading quest).

options.label: Progression Island Puzzles
options.description: This controls whether various island puzzles are randomized (e.g., chests hidden in unusual places).

options.label: Progression Misc
options.description: Miscellaneous locations that don't fit into any of the above categories (outdoors chests, wind shrine, Cyclos, etc).

options.label: Randomize Mapcompass
options.description: Controls how dungeon maps and compasses are randomized.

options.label: Randomize Smallkeys
options.description: Controls how small keys are randomized.

options.label: Randomize Bigkeys
options.description: Controls how big keys are randomized.

options.label: Sword Mode
options.description: Controls whether you start with the Hero's Sword, the Hero's Sword is randomized, or if there are no swords in the entire game.

options.label: Required Bosses
options.description: In this mode, you will not be allowed to beat the game until certain randomly-chosen bosses are defeated.

options.label: Num Required Bosses
options.description: Select the number of randomly-chosen bosses that are required in Required Bosses Mode.

options.label: Included Dungeons
options.description: A list of dungeons that should always be included when required bosses mode is on.

options.label: Excluded Dungeons
options.description: A list of dungeons that should always be excluded when required bosses mode is on.

options.label: Chest Type Matches Contents
options.description: Changes the chest type to reflect its contents.

options.label: Hero Mode
options.description: In Hero Mode, you take four times more damage than normal and heart refills will not drop.

options.label: Logic Obscurity
options.description: Obscure tricks are ways of obtaining items that are not obvious and may involve thinking outside the box.

options.label: Logic Precision
options.description: Precise tricks are ways of obtaining items that involve difficult inputs such as accurate aiming or perfect timing.

options.label: Enable Tuner Logic
options.description: If enabled, the randomizer can logically expect the Tingle Tuner for Tingle Chests.

options.label: Randomize Dungeon Entrances
options.description: Shuffles around which dungeon entrances take you into which dungeons.

options.label: Randomize Secret Cave Entrances
options.description: Shuffles around which secret cave entrances take you into which secret caves.

options.label: Randomize Miniboss Entrances
options.description: Allows dungeon miniboss doors to act as entrances to be randomized.

options.label: Randomize Boss Entrances
options.description: Allows dungeon boss doors to act as entrances to be randomized.

options.label: Randomize Secret Cave Inner Entrances
options.description: Allows the pit in Ice Ring Isle's secret cave and the rear exit out of Cliff Plateau Isles' secret cave to act as entrances to be randomized.

options.label: Randomize Fairy Fountain Entrances
options.description: Allows the pits that lead down into Fairy Fountains to act as entrances to be randomized.

options.label: Mix Entrances
options.description: Controls how the different types (pools) of randomized entrances should be shuffled.

options.label: Randomize Enemies
options.description: Randomizes the placement of non-boss enemies.

options.label: Randomize Starting Island
options.description: Randomizes which island you start the game on.

options.label: Randomize Charts
options.description: Randomizes which sector is drawn on each Triforce/Treasure Chart.

options.label: Swift Sail
options.description: Sailing speed is doubled and the direction of the wind is always at your back as long as the sail is out.

options.label: Instant Text Boxes
options.description: Text appears instantly.

options.label: Reveal Full Sea Chart
options.description: Start the game with the sea chart fully drawn out.

options.label: Add Shortcut Warps Between Dungeons
options.description: Adds new warp pots that act as shortcuts connecting dungeons to each other directly.

options.label: Skip Rematch Bosses
options.description: Removes the door in Ganon's Tower that only unlocks when you defeat the rematch versions of Gohma, Kalle Demos, Jalhalla, and Molgera.

options.label: Remove Music
options.description: Mutes all ingame music.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.
